fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: UVXY, a leveraged ETF designed to track volatility, is highlighted as one of ten leveraged ETFs built to lose value. This suggests a negative outlook for the instrument, likely due to its complex structure and the inherent decay in leveraged products over time. Investors should be aware of the significant risks associated with holding such instruments.

headlines.title: Stop Trading These 10 Leveraged ETFs Built to Lose

examples.body: Play what's ahead of you & not what you think should be but always remeber to hedge...just in case!!!! Bull market continues climbing the wall of worry…
